intro: The academic and healthcare sectors were primary targets in a concentrated wave of remote code execution attacks documented between April 12 and 20, 2026. The seventeen articles in this archive detail eleven critical and six high-severity vulnerabilities, with notable CVEs including CVE-2025-54987 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2025-0520 (CVSS 9.4), and CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3). Industrial and research organizations were also significantly impacted by these exploits, which frequently enabled complete system compromise.
